creator: mwisnicki+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
While trying to respond to ports/139975 I have forwarded a message
originally sent to maintainer. This was misinterpreted by GNATS as a new report,
possibly due to Fwd: instead of Re: in subject and ended up in ports/140508 ,
whose content was then migrated back to where it was intended.

Now, ports/139975 is missing content of the message and there is a
"for png, jpeg and others" misplaced just before message header.

How-To-Repeat: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/139975
